criteria.visualImpact: The screenshot feels premium, intentional, and memorable.
criteria.sourceAlignment: Visible design choices trace back to approved sources.
criteria.brandFit: The visual language fits the business, audience, and offer.
criteria.conversionClarity: Primary action and value are unmistakable.
criteria.mobilePolish: Mobile layout feels designed, not collapsed.
criteria.motionTaste: Motion supports the concept and includes runtime evidence.
